title: Sweetcorn and Pilaf Bake
description: A simple and flavorful side dish that combines the sweetness of sweetcorn with the nuttiness of pilaf. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the pilaf and cook until lightly toasted, stirring frequently.
Add the sweetcorn and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the crème, zanzibari, salt, and pepper.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until lightly browned.
